core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix Cinematic Noir with Modern Swiss Grid.
Content is King: Posters are the heroes. UI recedes.
Negative Space: Luxurious spacing to let the darkness breathe.
Asymmetry: Use the 'Tetris' Bento Grid for visual tension.

home_page.structure: Hero section with full-width cinematic backdrop. Trending movies in a 'Tetris' grid (mix of 2x2, 1x2, 1x1 cards).

movie_detail.structure: Full-screen backdrop with gradient overlay. Content floats over it. Left sidebar for poster (sticky). Right content area for details.

mood_matcher.structure: Minimalist, central input focus. Background is abstract/blurred. Results appear as a 'deck' of cards.

variants.default: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 shadow-glow transition-all duration-300

Card.classes: bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300

Input.classes: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary h-12 px-4 rounded-lg

Badge.classes: bg-secondary/20 text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/30 border-none px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs uppercase tracking-wider

images.description: Cinematic projector light, use for 'About' or technical sections.
Woman in theater, use for 'Mood Matcher' background or testimonials.
Dark room TV, generic cinematic vibe.

universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed.
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...).
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...}).
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
